# Surge Protocol

> Surge is a Bitcoin-native credit market for transparent, decentralized,
> and self-custodial lending.

## LLM Documentation Endpoints
- [llms.txt](https://docs.surge.build/llms.txt): This file - curated index of key pages
- [llms-full.txt](https://docs.surge.build/llms-full.txt): Full plain-text context for all 27 public docs pages
- [docs.md](https://docs.surge.build/docs.md): Raw markdown aggregation of docs content

## Get Started
- [Introducing Surge](https://docs.surge.build/): High-level overview of the Bitcoin-native credit market
- [Earn SDK Integration Guide](https://docs.surge.build/earn/integration): End-to-end integration for listing and deposit flows
- [Earn SDK Overview](https://docs.surge.build/earn/overview): SDK concepts, architecture, and capabilities

## Market Context
- [Market Landscape](https://docs.surge.build/overview/bitcoin-lending-landscape): Bitcoin lending landscape and protocol positioning
- [Stablecoin Adoption](https://docs.surge.build/overview/stablecoins): Stablecoin demand context and market dynamics

## Product
- [Product Overview](https://docs.surge.build/product/overview): Core product model and user journey
- [For Bitcoiners](https://docs.surge.build/product/for-bitcoiners): Value proposition for self-custodial Bitcoin users
- [For Distribution Partners](https://docs.surge.build/product/for-distribution-partners): Integration and distribution partner framing
- [For Everyone](https://docs.surge.build/product/for-everyone): Broad user-facing benefits and positioning
- [For Liquidity Providers](https://docs.surge.build/product/for-liquidity-providers): LP incentives and participation model
- [Our Thesis](https://docs.surge.build/product/our-thesis): Strategic thesis behind Surge's architecture

## Technology
- [Technical Overview](https://docs.surge.build/tech/overview): System architecture and protocol components
- [Credit Markets](https://docs.surge.build/tech/credit-markets): Market design for variable and fixed-rate liquidity
- [Distributed Custody Network](https://docs.surge.build/tech/distributed-custody-network): Threshold signer network and custody assumptions
- [DLCs](https://docs.surge.build/tech/dlcs): DLC-based settlement and contract primitives
- [dVaults](https://docs.surge.build/tech/vaults): Programmable Bitcoin vault mechanics
- [Deterministic Liquidation](https://docs.surge.build/tech/dvaults-liquidation): Liquidation flow for locked Bitcoin collateral
- [Execution State Machine](https://docs.surge.build/tech/execution): Execution lifecycle and state transitions
- [Unilateral Exit](https://docs.surge.build/tech/exit): User-controlled recovery path
- [Oracle System](https://docs.surge.build/tech/oracles): Pricing data and oracle assumptions
- [Repayment](https://docs.surge.build/tech/payment): Repayment routing and settlement behavior
- [Transfers](https://docs.surge.build/tech/transfers): Asset movement and transfer constraints
- [Self Custody User Wallet](https://docs.surge.build/tech/self-custody-wallet): Wallet model and user key ownership
- [FAQs](https://docs.surge.build/tech/faqs): Common implementation and protocol questions

## Resources
- [Media Kit](https://docs.surge.build/resources/media-kit): Brand assets and logos
- [Quick Links](https://docs.surge.build/resources/quick-links): Official website and social channels
- [Community Guidelines](https://docs.surge.build/resources/community-guidelines): Rules for community participation and safety
